comments: ADAWCAG.org is an online web accessibility evaluation tool for websites. It supports single-page and full-site scans (via crawl/sitemap), generates reports, and can be used for ongoing monitoring through scheduled rescans and alerts.
features: ADAWCAG.org helps teams evaluate and monitor web accessibility. It runs automated scans, captures evidence, and produces audit-ready reports to prioritize remediation. Ongoing monitoring with alerts supports governance and continuous improvement across releases.
title: Adawcag.org
